name: Hotel Assistant Tool - Get Guest History

parameters.jsCode:
const clientResult = $('GET Clients').first().json
const reservationResult = $('GET Guest Reservations').first().json
const clients = Array.isArray(clientResult.data) ? clientResult.data : Array.isArray(clientResult) ? clientResult : []
const history = Array.isArray(reservationResult.data) ? reservationResult.data : Array.isArray(reservationResult) ? reservationResult : []
return [{ json: { clients, guestHistory: history, sources: [{ type: 'api', name: 'GET /clients' }, { type: 'api', name: 'GET /reservations' }] } }]
